title: Please clarify copyright holders for https://github.com/containers/container-libs/tree/main/image/signature/internal/sequoia
body:
The files in https://github.com/containers/container-libs/tree/main/image/signature/internal/sequoia appear to be Apache-2.0 licensed. Looking at https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/image/signature/internal/sequoia/gosequoia.h#L2-L5

> * Copying and distribution of this file, with or without modification,
> * are permitted in any medium without royalty provided the copyright
> * notice and this notice are preserved.  This file is offered as-is,
> * without any warranty.

What's the copyright statement? Who is holding the copyright?

comments.body: Good catch, I've filed #473 and also updated https://github.com/ueno/dlwrap/commit/eaaa6136389035e17c48be71beb1ee548f96648e.

You might want to consider using SPDX also

```
* SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2025 Daiki Ueno
*
* SPDX-License-Identifier: FSFAP
```
@afbjorklund I guess we use either `SPDX-tagname` or the expanded copyright/license notices, but having both seems too much for me.
